problem_id: AI-Based Tender Evaluation and Eligibility Analysis for Government Procurement
team_name: Bidexa AI: Smarter, Fairer, and Safer Tender Evaluation with AI
summary: Design a technical platform that can understand tenders, evaluate eligibility, rank bidders, detect anomalies, incorporate Explainable AI, integrate with existing e-procurement systems, and improve efficiency in government procurement.
optimization_claims: Strengthened trust in public sector contracting
